items.label: § Writing
items.body: An essay on announcement copy — how screen-reader output reads when you take it as prose.

items.label: § Building
items.body: Prism, a perceptual contrast checker. Alpha with four teams.

items.label: ¶ Managing
items.body: Three designers and one a11y engineer at Superhuman. Quarterly planning this week.

items.label: ¶ Thinking about
items.body: About how to measure the quality of a screen-reader experience beyond "does it work."

items.label: ¶ Saying no to
items.body: New conference talks through the summer — writing instead.
